Unnamed Package

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Ability
    Class file for the abstract Ability class
    AdrenalineRush_Skill
    Class file for the AdrenalineRush_Skill class, this is a subclass of the abstract SKill class
    Armor
    Class file for the Armor class.
    BattleAxe
    Class file for the BattleAxe class, this is a subclass of the abstract Weapon class
    BattleAxe_Ability
    Class file for the BattleAxe_Ability class, this is a subclass of the Ability class
    Bomb
    Class file for the Bomb class, this is a subclass of the abstract Consumable class
    Buff
    Class file for the Buff class, this is a subclass of the abstract Consumable class
    CLIViewer
    Class file that handles rudimentary displaying of information in the command line.
    Consumable
    Class file for the abstract Consumable class.
    Dagger
    Class file for the Dagger class, this is a subclass of the abstract Weapon class
    Dagger_Ability
    Class file for the Dagger_Ability class, this is a subclass of the abstract Ability class
    DreamSlash_Skill
    Class file for the DreamSlash_Skill class, this is a subclass of the abstract Skill class
    EnchantedWeapon
    Class file for the EnchantedWeapon class, this is a subclass of the abstract Weapon class
    Enemy
    Class file for the abstract Enemy Class, this is a subclass of the abstract Character class.
    Entity
    Class file for the abstract entity class
    Environment
    Class file for the Environment class.
    EventController
    Class file that controls the events currently running in the program.
    Fists_Ability
    Class file for the Fists_Ability class, this is a subclass of the abstract Ability class
    Greatsword_Ability
    Class file for Greatsword_Ability, this is a subclass of the abstract Ability class
    GUIArmorSelectPanel
    Class file for managing the armor selection panel
    GUIBackgroundPanel
    Class for managing the current background image to be displayed
    GUIConsumableSelectPanel
    Class file for managing the consumable selection panel
    GUICurrentChoices
    Class to display currently the currently selected armor, weapon, consumable, and enemy before a battle starts
    GUIEnemySelectPanel
    Class file for managing the enemy selection panel
    GUIEnvironmentSelectPanel
    Class file for managing the environment selection panel
    GUIEventController
    Class file for the GUIEventController class
    GUIGamePanel
    Class file for the GUIGamePanel
    GUISelectionController
    Class file for the GUISelectionController class
    GUITurnHistoryController
    Class file for controlling and updating the turn history in a battle
    GUIViewer
    Class file for the GUIViewer class, this class serves a similar purpose to CLIViewer.
    GUIWeaponSelectPanel
    Class file for managing the weapon selection panel
    Healing
    Class file for the Buff class, this is a subclass of the abstract Consumable class
    Katana_Ability
    Class file for Katana_Ability, this is a subclass of the abstract Ability class
    Minotaur
    Class file for the Minotaur class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class
    Omnislash_Skill
    Class file for the Omnislash_Skill class, this is a subclass of the abstract Skill class
    Parry_Skill
    Class file for the Parry_Skill class, this is a subclass of the abstract Skill class
    Player
    Class file for the player class, the user's controllable fighter in the battle, this is a subclass of the abstract character class
    SelectionController
    Class file to control selections of weapon, armor, enemy, consumable, and environment objects.
    Skill
    Class file for the abstract Skill class
    Sword
    Class file for the Sword class, this is a subclass of the abstract Weapon class
    Sword_Ability
    Class file for Sword_Ability, this is a subclass of the abstract Ability class
    Thief
    Class file for the Thief class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class
    Unique_Enemy
    Class file for the Unique Enemy class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class
    Viking
    Class file for the Viking class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class
    Weapon
    Class file for the abstract Weapon class.
